description_long: This object represents an elderly person with a small, rounded head featuring short, curly white hair. The face is detailed with visible wrinkles and a neutral expression, and the skin tone is light. The body is extremely elongated and distorted, with limbs and torso stretched into thin, angular forms that do not resemble natural human proportions. The clothing appears to be a single, dark, glossy garment that envelops the body, lacking clear separation between upper and lower garments. The overall form is abstract and stylized, with exaggerated, sweeping lines and a shiny surface. The figure is not using any visible walking aid and is depicted in a reclined or leaning posture.
description: An abstract, elongated elderly person with short curly white hair, wrinkled face, and a glossy dark garment, depicted in a distorted, reclined posture.
description_view_0: The head and face are most visible, with the white hair and facial features clearly shown; the body appears to extend backward in a sweeping, angular form.
description_view_1: The side profile emphasizes the extreme elongation of the body and limbs, with the head at one end and the glossy garment stretching out.
description_view_2: The back of the head is visible, and the body appears to form a wide, angular base, highlighting the abstract, non-human proportions.
description_view_3: The head is seen in profile, and the body’s glossy, stretched form is prominent, with the limbs and torso blending into a single, sweeping shape.
attribute_clothing_style: A single-piece, dark, glossy garment with no visible separation between upper and lower clothing; no visible accessories.
attribute_posture: reclined and elongated, with body stretched in an unnatural, abstract pose
attribute_facial_features: wrinkled face, no facial hair, neutral expression, no glasses
